chapter_title.en: Reports of those who saw the Imam of the Time (a.s)

text: 232- وبهذا الاسناد، عن إبراهيم بن إدريس قال: رأيته بعد مضي أبي محمد عليه السلام حين أيفع وقبلت يديه ورأسه.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 232 - It is narrated from the same chains from Ibrahim bin Idris that he said: “I saw him after the passing away of Abu Muhammad Askari (a.s) when he had grown up; I kissed his hand and his head.”
